title: Short Swords
description: A texture pack that shortens the length of every sword to optimize visibility during PVP battles, and also short swords are cool.
body:
⚔️ A texture pack that shortens the length of every sword to optimize visibility during PVP battles.

🌹The texture pack works on practically all versions and can be used as an overlay as well, enjoy!![An image that shows all the swords.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea3966f20369afbdcfe826e2851abd435eb62608.png)
